flavorText.message: Puts the "ad" in "adhesive"!
You can have whatever sticker you want, as long as it's random!
Puts the "ad" in "adhesive"!
You really know what you want, don't you!
Take your pick!

inventory.name: 3d printing
inventory.description: We'll issue you a card for your amount you can use at the 3d printing service of your choice, or for ordering the filament of your choice.

flavorText.message: Takes the "rapid" out of "rapid prototyping"!
Oh, do they print in chocolate?!
If a picture is worth 1000 words, a 3d print should be worth [ArithmeticOverflowException]
It's like a hot glue gun, but with more steps
if you make a 3d printer by printing it, how did they make the first?

inventory.name: Breadboard
inventory.description: We can fulfill this to any address Amazon ships to.

flavorText.message: Ooooh! Shiny
Red to red and black to black!
And if you short it, you'll have toast!
It's a canvas for electrons!
wonder if it's gluten free?
an important part of a circuit sandwich
low carb!
no soldering required!
breadboard, breadboard, make me a circuit
connect the dots!
any circuit is a smoke machine if you're wrong enough

inventory.name: Multimeter
inventory.description: We can fulfill this to any address Amazon ships to.

flavorText.message: V over I * R, right?
Ooooh! Shiny
Red to red and black to black!
What do these things actually measure?
What's up, ohmie?
I'm not sure what I'm measuring, but I'm sure it's important
Ohm my!
It's like a lie detector, but for electrons!
Red probe on ground, black probe...       ....wait.
ooooh, the beep boop box
red to ground, black to power, and... oh, the smoke machine works!
now go measure your... multis?
sigh, i'm sorry, i'm struggling with some good puns for this one

inventory.name: Soldering iron
inventory.description: We can fulfill this to any address Amazon ships to.

flavorText.message: Warning: May contain lead
Be careful if you have a lead allergy!
hot! Hot! HOT!
It’s like welding but tiny!

don't hold it by the hot end...
ask me how i know
if you used these as chopsticks you could cook your food while you eat it!
don't use these as chopsticks...
Ooooh! Shiny
There’s a joke in here somewhere about tracking time so you get a clock, but I can’t think of it rn
Every hour more power!
Tick tock!
An hour a day keeps the doctor away!
Psh, it's just a pico and a 7-segment display...
I bet you could use that pi pico for something fun
oh no, it's ticking down!
quick, do something productive!
every time you use this, you get a little bit closer to being a tomato
go on, take a break! you've earned it!
pomodoro, pomodoro, wherefore art thou, pomodoro?

inventory.name: Wacom
inventory.description: We can fulfill this to any address Amazon ships to.

flavorText.message: There's probably a wacom-mole joke I could make here...
Ooooh, can I see whatcha gonna draw?
Oh, maybe you could draw me?
Do you take commissions?
quick! photoshop or paint tool sai?
Personally, I was drawn on trackpad
h-hey! maybe you could make me a ref sheet?
P-please don't erase me!!!
do you wanna do an art trade?
Do you wanna use it for hack.af/draw-dino?
Ooooh, what's your DeviantArt? I'll give you a llama badge!
oh oh oh! let me see your OCs!
digital illustration is my passion
how many layers are you using?
the pen is mightier than the mouse?
aaah yes, digital art, the only way to draw a straight line

Raccoon.message: i'm a luxury you can't afford!
click me one more time, i dare you.
i'm flattered you think i'm a treasure, but i'm just trash...
guess who's got 2 thumbs and is not for sale!

Dino.message: w-wait, I'm not a marketable plushie!
click me again and you'll be hearing from my lawyers!
